description_long: This is a thick hardcover book with a green cover adorned with ornate gold borders and a central floral illustration featuring pink and red flowers with green stems and leaves. The front cover is richly decorated, giving the book a vintage or classic appearance. The spine is also green with gold embellishments and text, matching the front cover's ornate style. The back cover is darker, with a block of text and a barcode at the bottom, indicating it is a published work. The book's pages are cream-colored and tightly bound, with visible texture along the edges. The overall condition appears well-kept, with minor wear along the edges and corners.
description: A thick, ornate hardcover book with a green and gold floral cover and cream-colored pages, featuring vintage decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showcasing a green background with gold borders and a central floral illustration.
description_view_1: The book is seen from a front-side angle, highlighting the thickness of the cream-colored pages and the ornate front cover.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, darker in color with a block of text and a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the back-side, showing the spine's gold embellishments and the cream-colored page edges.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a detailed, vintage-style floral illustration with pink and red flowers and green stems, surrounded by ornate gold borders. The artwork is decorative and lush, evoking a classic botanical or Victorian aesthetic.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is green with gold decorative elements and text running vertically, matching the ornate style of the front cover. Gold embellishments and possible floral motifs are present.
